creator: saper@saper.info
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #6)

>  - Add workaround for i386 to deal with kernel bug 178881 [1]
>    (PR/178881: getifaddrs(3) does not report IPv6 addresses properly in 32-bit > compatibility mode)

This workaround disables getifaddr(3) functionality completely in npm.
Actually it should work fine for i386 userland running on i386 kernels; only i386 userland on the amd64 kernel is affected.
